meta.title: Language Strategy in Multinational Companies
meta.sourceDoc: 73. P3 - Language Strategy in Multinational Companies 跨国公司语言策略.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: Language Strategy in Multinational Companies 跨国公司语言策略

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：B
PDF 定位/解析：Lingua Franca 段落第2句提到"British exporting companies found that over a third used English exclusively in dealings with foreign customers"."foreign customers""即 overseas clients。

题目 28
答案：F
PDF 定位/解析：同段稍后举例："when translating key documents,differences inevitably arise because of rules in different countries"。 故填documents。

题目 29
答案：A
PDF 定位/解析：FunctionalMultilingualism段首句：该方法是"relyingonamixoflanguages，pidginsandgestures"。因此用 gestures填空。

题目 30
答案：C
PDF 定位/解析：同段末尾引用Hagen调查："16%of internationalbusinesstransactionsareconductedina'cocktailoflanguages" 故填transactions。

题目 31
答案：L
PDF 定位/解析：ExternalLanguageResources段落第1句指出翻译/口译服务"canbeveryexpensive"，即costly。

题目 32
答案：D
PDF 定位/解析：同段中部："theymustuseinitiativeandguess-work"。guess-work本质是基于assumption，故选assumption。

questionSections.text:
题目 33
答案：personnel development
PDF 定位/解析：Training 段首句:"The immediate and understandable reaction to any skills shortage is to consider personnel development..."

题目 34
答案：a luxury
PDF 定位/解析：同段第二句："whenbeltstighten,trainingisoneofthefirstluxuriestobepareddown"。作者在经济低迷时把培 训称作"luxury"。

题目 35
答案：a language strategy
PDF 定位/解析：为其他跨国公司树立的范例。

题目 36
答案：strategic solution
PDF 定位/解析：紧接上一句：""Volkswagentreatslanguagetrainingasastrategic solution,notatacticalone"。问training被视为哪类 解决方案答案即strategic。

题目 37
答案：six
PDF 定位/解析：同段："requirescompletionof sixlanguagestages"。

题目 38
答案：90 hours
PDF 解析页 OCR：90 hours

题目 39
答案：three years
PDF 定位/解析：段末:"expects a minimum of three years of fairly intensive study before ... can work effectively"。

questionSections.text:
题目 40
答案：C
PDF 定位/解析：全文先后评述linguafranca、functionalmultilingualism、外部资源与培训的优劣，整体意图是"评估跨国公司面对语言壁垒 的多种做法"，对应选项C。其它选项要么只揭示问题(A)、只列举案例(B)、或片面强调培训(D)，均与全文主旨不符。
